name: San Antonio Rice
recipeIngredient: 11 oz Mexican style corn, finely chopped, with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray the rice cooker with nonstick spray.
2. Add all ingredients except cilantro to the rice cooker and stir.
3. Cover and cook on high heat until liquid has evaporated.
4. Lift the cover, quickly stir the mixture, and replace the cover.
5. Allow the rice to steam for 8 to 10 minutes before serving.
6. Spoon into a warm serving dish and garnish with fresh cilantro.
Good (6/97)
